title: Crispy Ethiopian Chickpea Fritters
description: A crunchy and flavorful appetizer inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, made with chickpeas, spices, and crispy batter.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a large bowl, mash the chickpeas using a fork or a potato masher.
Add the grated bitter gourd, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground cumin, ground coriander, and crispy spice blend (if using) to the bowl with the chickpeas. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, mix the flour and a pinch of salt. Gradually add the flour mixture to the chickpea mixture and mix until a thick batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1/4 cup each. Fry the fritters in batches until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the crispy Ethiopian chickpea fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
